metadata.source: OpenAlex API (2015-2022) + Clarivate JCR suppressed title lists
metadata.task: Binary node classification: given a directed journal×journal citation pair, predict whether the source journal was suppressed by Clarivate JCR for citation manipulation. Designed for Hodge decomposition feature extraction on citation networks.
metadata.label_description: label=1: journal suppressed by Clarivate JCR 2018-2022 for citation stacking or excessive self-citation; label=0: not suppressed

examples.input: Journal citation pair (2015-2022): [Sustainability] cites [Sensors] 53 times; [Sensors] cites [Sustainability] 30 times; net flow (Sustainability→Sensors) = 23. Journal [Sustainability] field: unknown; works in period: 107084. Task: classify whether [Sustainability] was suppressed by Clarivate JCR for citation manipulation (stacking or excessive self-citation) during 2018-2022.

Journal citation pair (2015-2022): [Sustainability] cites [Nature Materials] 3 times; [Nature Materials] cites [Sustainability] 0 times; net flow (Sustainability→Nature Materials) = 3. Journal [Sustainability] field: unknown; works in period: 107084. Task: classify whether [Sustainability] was suppressed by Clarivate JCR for citation manipulation (stacking or excessive self-citation) during 2018-2022.

Journal citation pair (2015-2022): [Sustainability] cites [Biochemistry] 1 times; [Biochemistry] cites [Sustainability] 0 times; net flow (Sustainability→Biochemistry) = 1. Journal [Sustainability] field: unknown; works in period: 107084. Task: classify whether [Sustainability] was suppressed by Clarivate JCR for citation manipulation (stacking or excessive self-citation) during 2018-2022.
